product.name: Snickers Chocolate Bar - Peanut

metaData.Key Information:
You’re out. You’re on the go and most importantly, you’re busy. Whether you’ve missed the bus, got caught in the pouring rain or your day is just going from bad to worse Snickers snack bars will sort you out.

Active lifestyle? Reach for Snickers to help keep you going, wherever you’re going. Whether you’re halfway up a mountain or at half-time during your weekly five-a-side match.

Don’t lose steam when the clock is running out. Share a fun size Snickers Bar before the game and leave hunger on the sidelines.
